nasb.text: Boasting is necessary, though it is not profitable; but I will go on to visions and revelations of the Lord.

esv.text: I must go on boasting. Though there is nothing to be gained by it, I will go on to visions and revelations of the Lord.

cnv.text: 誇口固然無益，卻也是必要的。現在我要說說主的異象和啟示。

ccb.text: 自夸虽然无益，但我不得不继续夸下去，谈谈主给我的异象和启示。

csbs.text: 夸耀虽然没有益处，但是必须的；我要说到主的异象和启示：
